intro.p1: By visiting the website smokyconcepts.com (hereinafter referred to as the “Website”) and making purchases, you automatically consent to the collection, processing, and use of your personal data.
intro.p2: By "Personal Data," we mean any information that allows or may allow us to directly or indirectly identify your identity, such as your name, surname, address, email, phone number, and other data (hereinafter referred to as "Data").
intro.p3: In this Privacy Policy, "we," "us," and "our" refer to Website (for more information, please visit the "About Us" section), while "you," "your," and "yours" refer to any individual who visits the Website or uses our services.

collectedData.title: 1. Collected Data
collectedData.intro: We may collect the following types of information:

bullets.contact: Contact information – name, surname, address, phone number, email address
bullets.purchase: Purchase information – products purchased, payment methods
bullets.technical: Technical information – device type, browser, operating system
bullets.cookies: Cookies and tracking technologies – for website usage analysis

dataUsage.title: 2. Use of Data
dataUsage.intro: Collected data is never sold or provided to third parties for marketing purposes. It is used only for the following purposes:

retention.title: 3. Data Retention Periods
retention.intro: Your personal data is stored as follows:

bullets.account: User account data – as long as the account is active
bullets.history: Purchase history – 5 years (to comply with tax and accounting regulations)
bullets.marketing: Marketing data – 2 years or until the user opts out

security.title: 4. Data Security
security.intro: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to ensure the protection of your data, including:

bullets.ssl: SSL encryption – to secure payment and personal data transmission
bullets.access: Access control – limited access to personal data
bullets.audits: Regular audits – to detect potential security vulnerabilities

sharing.title: 5. Sharing Data with Third Parties
sharing.intro: We do not sell or provide your data to third parties, except for:

bullets.shipping: Shipping services – to ensure order delivery
bullets.payment: Payment systems – for secure payment processing
bullets.law: Law enforcement authorities – in cases required by law

sharing.outro: All third parties are obligated to protect your data and cannot use it for other purposes.

bullets.copy: Receive a copy of your personal data
bullets.editDelete: Edit or delete your data (through our website settings or customer support)
bullets.unsubscribe: Opt-out of marketing emails (via the "unsubscribe" link in each email)
bullets.restrict: Request that your data is not processed for specific purposes, except in cases required by law

cookies.title: 7. Cookies Usage
cookies.intro: Our website uses cookies to optimize user experience. We use:

bullets.functional: Functional cookies – to ensure proper website operation
bullets.analytics: Analytical cookies – to understand user behavior and improve the website
bullets.marketing: Marketing cookies (only with your consent) – to provide more relevant advertisements

changes.title: 8. Policy Changes
changes.intro: We reserve the right to make legally permitted changes to this page and the above sections. Updates will be posted on the Website.
